raw.subject: Your Myrtle Beach page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love seeing the camaraderie on your Facebook page, especially the photo with Niki Regal and the team. It's great to see a locally-loved business like yours.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and as a salon, it's hard to attract new clients and grow your business without a central online hub. Every day, potential customers are searching for services like yours, and without a website, you're missing out on opportunities to connect with them.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea based on your Facebook photos and posts, featuring a services menu, a work gallery, and a prominent booking CTA, along with your hours and location.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/infinity-hair-salon-myrtle-beach

I'd love to discuss building out a custom website for you, with a flat fee for local businesses that's straightforward and easy to understand. If you're interested in learning more, I'd be happy to reply or we could schedule a quick call to chat about your options.
